---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as documented
labels: bug
---

**Package & version**
e.g. @aleph/core 0.2.0 (or commit SHA)

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Reproduction**
Minimal steps or a code snippet.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
Node version, OS.

> For security vulnerabilities, do NOT use this template — see SECURITY.md.
